prompt: Create a 3D particle system generator website. Left side should show an animated particle cloud in Three.js. Right side should have sliders for particle count, speed, spread radius, and a color picker. Add a randomize button.

assertions.description: HTML file includes Three.js CDN script tag
Scene uses Points or BufferGeometry to render particles
Page has a two-panel layout with 3D canvas on the left
Right panel has a slider for particle count
Right panel has a slider for particle speed
Right panel has a slider for spread/radius
Right panel has a color picker input
Right panel has a Randomize button
Output HTML file is saved inside the assets/ directory
